name: A Dual-Hypothesis Reasoning Framework for LLM Guardrails

description: arXiv:2607.17575v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We propose ARBITER, a novel LLM guardrail framework that introduces two key ideas: (i) dual-hypothesis reasoning, a reasoning method for LLM guardrails that explicitly considers both safe and unsafe interpretations of a prompt before making a safety decision, and (ii) multi-component supervised fine-tuning (MC-SFT), a structured training loss for...
author: Md Asiful Islam, Mihai Surdeanu
